payload.answer: This appears to be a duplicate Slack event delivery for the same fact: “Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.”
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
repair_options: Treat the second delivery as a duplicate and ignore it.
Keep both as separate source events without merging them.
If you want a conservative record, store only one instance of the fact and flag the second as a replayed event.
